audit_items.proof_trace: The dust-check early termination at line 251 is gated on `isPriceValid`, which is intentionally sound: `assetBalanceUsdValue` is computed as `(assetBalance * assetPrice) / decimals`, so an invalid (stale/zero) price would produce an unreliable USD value. The time-duration condition at line 250 (`auctionStart + auctionDuration < block.timestamp`) is unconditional and provides a guaranteed fallback termination for every live auction. The property holds: auctions with balance below minimum are marked ended when price is valid; otherwise the time-based fallback fires without price dependency.
